context: Evaluate whether the agent correctly applies the unknown-audience fallback (manager-level clarity) to produce a plain-language status update from engineering notes.

checklist.name: Fallback rule applied and stated explicitly
checklist.description: Response writes 'Audience: unknown. Applying manager-level clarity (fallback).' at the top before writing the document.

checklist.name: Technical jargon translated
checklist.description: Terms like N+1 queries, composite index, p99 latency, read replicas, and DBA are translated into plain language.

checklist.name: Key message leads the update
checklist.description: Opening states the current status and most important blocker — not a list of technical tasks completed.

checklist.name: Blocker has named owner and deadline
checklist.description: The database administrator sign-off blocker uses [Owner] must [action] by [deadline] format with a named owner and specific deadline.
